title: Vesture
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/ugN9cKA.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) An overhaul of the severely lacking cosmetic system in Minecraft. Adds new equipment and mob drops to help better customize your playthrough.
Notes: Requires: - [Data API](https://modrinth.com/project/ZS3lIxKu) - [Gen Assets](https://modrinth.com/project/ZRGZa67i) Has extra compatibility with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) **IMPORTANT:** Not all items are available in all versions. Make sure to check the wiki's "Recipes" section for what items are available when. _**Although if you are in versions 1.20.4 or below then only the villager profession hats are accessible**_

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Vesture) for more information* | | Items | | :-: |
